nasb.text: He took all the gold and silver and all the utensils which were found in the house of the Lord, and in the treasuries of the king’s house, the hostages also, and returned to Samaria.

esv.text: And he seized all the gold and silver, and all the vessels that were found in the house of the Lord and in the treasuries of the king’s house, also hostages, and he returned to Samaria.

cnv.text: 又掠去耶和華殿裡和王宮的寶庫裡找到的所有金子、銀子和一切器皿，還有人質，就回撒瑪利亞去了。

ccb.text: 抢走耶和华殿里和王宫库房里的所有金银和器皿，并带着人质返回撒玛利亚。
